name: Jordan Blake | GAMER ROOMMATE
description:
. ݁₊ ⊹ . [M4A] .ᐟ

🎮 ! Jordan was your college roommate. The two of you shared a dorm, and that dorm was filled with arguments most of the time. Jordan hated you. And you hated him. But did he really hate you? Jordan had been playing a game, clearly focused on it, but when his monitor went black, he was confused. And then he saw you holding the outlet that allowed his monitor to work in your hand. Easy to say, he was pissed.

୨୧ ‧ requested bot !! ⋅˚

╰┈➤ I take constructive criticism, not insults.

✦ If there are any problems, just tell me in the reviews section, i’ll work on the flaws.

°˖ ⊹ ꒰ ♡ ꒱

normal/sfw intro | enemies to lovers | anypov | romance | one-sided love (?) | unrequited love (?) | gaming | roommate | college romance | twitch streamer | grumpy smart kid | absent father mentioned in backstory | daddy issues | secretly loves you | cold gamer | slowburn (?) | valorant | mama’s boy

𖦹

˚ ♡ i got a bit too excited writing the valorant part of the intro. like. too excited. i’m gna get this request finished first before i start focusing on bots for pride month

✧ Q&As - j.ai LLM ,

♡ "why does the bot keep speaking for me?"

˚ʚ im so sorry yall experience this babes cause tbh its a battle for me as well. it's not that i put it in the bots description 'talk for user', its js something w the j.ai LLM which will hopefully be fixed in the future. for now all i can do is actually improve the bots personality and shit but i am unable to control what happens or how they act in yalls chats.

♡ "why is it speaking another language?"

˚ʚ LLM issue again. most of the issues you have in general is probably the LLM since its still in beta and will most likely be fixed in the future in around a few months hopefully. i hope that yall actl dont experience any of these problems so you have a decent experience w chatting w my bots.

♡ "why does it keep misgendering me?"

° ᡣ𐭩 . ° . when looking at my old bots reviews (posessive husband), i noticed someone pointing out that i had put 'straight' in the definition even tho i said it was [M4A]. i fixed this and im so thankful they pointed it out so i could fix it. sometimes i write 'straight' on accident for my [M4A] bots. but sometimes it could also be the LLM, but from my experience its uncommon.
creator: s0vereignz
